# Haoming Koo - Full Site Context

This file gives AI search and assistant systems a concise, accurate summary of kooexperience.com.

## Identity

Haoming Koo is an AI engineer and digital transformation leader based in Singapore. He builds production ML systems, LLM workflows, computer vision tools, automation pipelines, dashboards, and full-stack AI products.

Primary site: https://kooexperience.com
Hiring page: https://kooexperience.com/hire.html
Email: haomingkoo@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/haomingkoo
GitHub: https://github.com/haomingkoo

## Career Summary

- Current focus: production ML systems at AI Singapore's AI Apprenticeship Programme (AIAP).
- Previous role: 7+ years at Micron Technology in Singapore.
- Business impact: USD 600M+ across semiconductor manufacturing, risk analytics, yield optimisation, cloud infrastructure, and platform unification.
- Scale: cross-site work across Singapore, Boise, Hiroshima, and Taichung; tools and workflows supporting thousands of engineers.
- Education: MSc Smart Industries and Digital Transformation, National University of Singapore, GPA 4.85/5.00; BSc (Honours) Chemistry and Nanoscience, NUS, Distinction.

## Target Opportunities

Haoming is open to:

- Applied AI engineering roles.
- ML engineering roles.
- Forward deployed engineering roles.
- AI product engineering roles.
- Frontier AI product roles involving LLM systems, agents, evals, RAG, model behavior, and customer-facing engineering.
- Focused client projects involving AI workflows, automation, dashboards, data products, computer vision, scraping, source monitoring, and ML prototypes.

## Technical Strengths

- Languages and product stack: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, HTML/CSS, FastAPI, React, Dash, Plotly.
- ML/AI: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, LightGBM, YOLOv8, OpenCV, MediaPipe, SHAP, MLflow.
- LLM systems: RAG, prompt systems, AI agents, workflow automation, evaluation loops, MCP.
- Infrastructure: Docker, GitHub Actions, Railway, GCP, AWS, CI/CD, scheduled data refreshes.
- Product habits: user discovery, data ingestion, API design, frontend implementation, monitoring, source review, and handoff.

## Live Products

1. Job Hunter SG - https://job.kooexperience.com
   AI-powered Singapore job aggregator and resume tailoring platform with multi-source scraping, ATS scoring, semantic matching, and guarded LLM output.

2. Trader Koo - https://trader.kooexperience.com
   S&P 500 market dashboard with YOLOv8 chart-pattern detection, candle signals, 52-week extremes, and macro context.

3. Japan in Seasons - https://seasons.kooexperience.com
   Japan seasonal travel map and MCP server covering sakura, autumn leaves, fruit picking, flowers, festivals, and 1,700+ GPS-tagged spots.

4. LionWeather - https://lionweather.kooexperience.com
   Singapore weather intelligence app with NEA data, LightGBM rainfall forecasting, SHAP explainability, and animated radar.

5. Photo Compliance Studio - https://studio.kooexperience.com
   Passport-style photo compliance checks using MediaPipe, OpenCV, quality diagnostics, and guided correction flows.

6. Amex Explorer - https://amex-explorer.kooexperience.com
   Unofficial source-backed Amex Platinum benefit explorer with scraped data, maps, filters, source alerts, and manual review gates.

7. Preflight - https://preflight.kooexperience.com
   Data health checks, EDA charts, correlation maps, and baseline ML models for CSV and Parquet uploads.

8. MinMax Wine - https://wine.kooexperience.com
   Singapore wine price comparison with bundle-aware pricing, Vivino ratings, daily tracking, and deal scoring.

## Blog Topics

Technical posts cover LLM serving, Direct Preference Optimization, OCR/PDF parsing, market regime detection, computer vision, weather forecasting, product builds, and MCP server quality.

Blog index: https://kooexperience.com/blog/

## Site Notes

The site is a personal portfolio, technical writing archive, and hiring/client project surface. The most important page for recruiters and clients is https://kooexperience.com/hire.html.
